column1: # S-57 Attribute (ATTL) → S-101 Feature Catalogue attribute code.
# Source: IHO S-57 Edition 3.1 Appendix A "ENC Use of the Object Catalogue"
# for the ATTL → S-57 attribute acronym mapping; IHO S-57 to S-101 conversion
# guidance for the S-57 → S-101 attribute mapping.
# v1 covers a breadth-first subset of the most common attributes. Listed-value
# remapping (S-57 enum codes to S-101 enum codes) is not yet performed:
# string attribute values pass through unchanged
# many but not all conditional portrayal rules.
# - Some S-57 attributes have no flat S-101 equivalent and require complex
#   attributes (e.g. OBJNAM/NOBJNM → featureName with sub-attributes); those
#   are intentionally omitted from this mapping until v2.
# - Listed-value codes (enums) are not remapped here; S-57 numeric codes are

column2: which matches S-101 numeric codes for many
